items.title: Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare Industry Unlocking New Horizons in Patient Care and Cost Efficiency at a CAGR of 18.2% between 2025 and 2035 | Future Market Insights Inc.
items.author: Sabyasachi Ghosh (Associate Vice President At Future Market Insights, Inc.)
items.description: The global artificial intelligence in healthcare market is projected to grow exponentially, reaching an estimated valuation of USD 17,198.9 million by 2025 and USD 77,456.4 million by 2035. This growth is driven by advancements in AI technologies, rising healthcare costs, and increasing demand for innovative solutions.
